name: hostodo_list_vms
description: List the authenticated Hostodo customer's VPS instances and capability flags.

name: hostodo_get_vm
description: Get detailed metadata for one owned Hostodo VPS. VM references may be id, hostname, or unique prefix.

name: hostodo_list_templates
description: List enabled OS templates that can be used with VM reinstall workflows. Use the returned id as template_id. Requires vms:read scope.

name: hostodo_power_vm
description: Power-control one owned VPS. Actions: start, shutdown, reboot, stop, reset.

name: hostodo_exec_vm_command
description: Execute a bounded root command inside one owned VPS via the QEMU guest agent.

name: hostodo_set_vm_exec_enabled
description: Enable or disable MCP/QEMU guest-agent root command execution for one owned VPS. Requires vms:exec scope and an exact confirmation phrase. For enable, confirmation must be exactly: ENABLE MCP EXEC <vm_id>. For disable, confirmation must be exactly: DISABLE MCP EXEC <vm_id>. Use the VM's Hostodo instance id, not its hostname.

vm_id.description: Hostodo instance id, for example ins::chud7xorwx.

confirmation.description: Exact confirmation phrase. If enabled=true, use ENABLE MCP EXEC <vm_id>. If enabled=false, use DISABLE MCP EXEC <vm_id>. Example: ENABLE MCP EXEC ins::chud7xorwx

name: hostodo_reinstall_vm
description: Destructively reinstall one owned Hostodo VPS to an enabled OS template. Call hostodo_list_templates first to discover valid template_id values. Requires vms:power scope and the exact confirmation phrase: REINSTALL <vm_id> TO TEMPLATE <template_id>. This deletes and rebuilds the guest disk, starts the VM, and returns a one-time root password.

vm_id.description: Hostodo instance id, hostname, or unique prefix.

template_id.description: Enabled OdoPanel template id to reinstall to.

confirmation.description: Exact phrase: REINSTALL <vm_id> TO TEMPLATE <template_id>. Example: REINSTALL ins::chud7xorwx TO TEMPLATE 12

ssh_key_id.description: Optional owned SSH key id to inject during reinstall.

name: hostodo_rename_vm
description: Rename one owned Hostodo VPS hostname/display label. Requires vms:power scope and exact confirmation phrase: RENAME <vm_id> TO <hostname>.

vm_id.description: Hostodo instance id, current hostname, or unique prefix.

hostname.description: New hostname/display label for the VPS.

confirmation.description: Exact phrase: RENAME <vm_id> TO <hostname>. Example: RENAME ins::chud7xorwx TO app-server

name: hostodo_create_artifact_upload
description: Create an upload slot for transferring a file to a Hostodo VPS. Returns a presigned PUT URL valid for 15 minutes. After uploading, use hostodo_install_artifact to install the file to the VM filesystem. Requires vms:exec scope and mcp_exec_enabled on the target VM.

vm_id.description: Hostodo instance id, hostname, or unique prefix.

filename.description: Filename for the artifact. Must be alphanumeric with dots, dashes, underscores. Max 200 characters.

size_bytes.description: Exact size of the file in bytes.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the file content (64 hex characters).

purpose.description: Purpose category. 'file' allows up to 256MB, 'config' up to 1MB, 'script' up to 5MB.

name: hostodo_install_artifact
description: Install a previously uploaded artifact to the VM filesystem. Downloads the artifact to the VM, verifies SHA-256, sets ownership and permissions, and atomically moves to the destination path. Requires vms:exec scope and mcp_exec_enabled on the target VM.

destination_path.description: Absolute path where the file will be installed. Parent directories will be created if needed. Certain system paths are denied.

owner.description: File owner in 'user' or 'user:group' format. Default: 'root'.

name: hostodo_start_vm_command
description: Start a long-running async command on one owned VPS. Returns immediately with a command_id for polling via hostodo_get_vm_command_output. Use for builds, package installs, migrations, service restarts, etc. Requires vms:exec scope and mcp_exec_enabled=true on the VM.

vm_id.description: Hostodo instance id, hostname, or unique prefix.

command.description: Shell command to execute (e.g., 'docker compose build').

working_directory.description: Optional absolute path to run command from.

name: hostodo_get_vm_command_output
description: Get status and bounded output tails for an async command run. Returns current status, exit_code, stdout/stderr tails, and next offsets for incremental reads via hostodo_read_vm_command_logs.

vm_id.description: Hostodo instance id, hostname, or unique prefix.

stdout_tail_bytes.description: Max bytes of stdout tail to return (default 8192).

stderr_tail_bytes.description: Max bytes of stderr tail to return (default 8192).

name: hostodo_read_vm_command_logs
description: Read incremental stdout/stderr chunks from an async command run by offset. Use next_stdout_offset and next_stderr_offset from previous calls to resume.

vm_id.description: Hostodo instance id, hostname, or unique prefix.

stdout_offset.description: Byte offset to start reading stdout from (default 0).

stderr_offset.description: Byte offset to start reading stderr from (default 0).

max_bytes.description: Max bytes to read per stream (default 16384, max 65536).

name: hostodo_cancel_vm_command
description: Cancel a running async command. Returns the final status. Has no effect if the command already finished.

vm_id.description: Hostodo instance id, hostname, or unique prefix.
